title: Mideast Live Updates: Fighting Persists in Lebanon, Complicating Iran Peace Talks
summary_full: The Israeli military said it had exchanged fire with Hezbollah overnight, hours after a new cease-fire came into effect. Clashes in Lebanon derailed U.S.-Iran peace talks planned for Friday.
